title: V1.4 WS2 — Orchestration skeleton (engine + capability registry + worker manager + _system.maintenance)
notes: All 10 tasks done (T1-T6 in Batches ①-③, T7-T10 in Batch ④). Full CI gate passed. QC triple-review approved. QA verified.

metadata.description: New crate crates/nexus-orchestration. OrchestrationEngine trait + GraphFlowEngine adapter over graph-flow=0.2.3, SqliteSessionStorage (sqlx, sharing nexus-local-db's pool — WS8 prereq for Task 3), Capability trait + non-ACP built-ins (sync/outbox/workspace/registry/creator.{read,write,inject}/judge.rule), WorkerManager + stdin/stdout JSON-RPC IPC (jsonrpsee-core + RpcTransport trait + NDJSON via tokio_util::codec::LinesCodec — selection closed per crate-selection-best-practices-v1 §3.1), _system.maintenance hardcoded graph, /v1/local/orchestration/* HTTP. ACP-touching capabilities + preset file loader deferred to WS3.
blocking_dependencies: 2026-04-17-v1.4-ws8-local-db-sqlx-migration (Task 3 SqliteSessionStorage only; Tasks 1-2 + 4-10 may run in parallel with WS8)
commits: bc8a7e9 chore(orchestration): scaffold crate with graph-flow=0.2.3 (WS2 T1)
f8d225a feat(orchestration): OrchestrationEngine trait + GraphFlowEngine adapter (WS2 T2)
43a8386 feat(orchestration): Capability trait + non-ACP built-ins + standard Task impls (WS2 T4)
bbddcc6 feat(orchestration): Worker Manager + jsonrpsee-core stdio NDJSON IPC (WS2 T5)
16a93df feat(orchestration): _system.maintenance hardcoded graph + E2E smoke (WS2 T6)
754db03 feat(daemon): wire engine + worker manager + system preset at boot (WS2 T8)
aa628ed refactor(nexus42): remove WS1 ACP compat shim; import directly from nexus-acp-host (WS2 T9)
cb467e2 chore(ci): pass full CI gate — fmt + clippy + unused import cleanup (WS2 T10)
ca1a133 fix(ws2): address 6 must-fix QC findings from triple review
f358f80 fix(ws2): apply cargo +nightly fmt for CI verify-codegen gate
368bd05 docs(qa): WS2 orchestration skeleton QA verification report
b21cc7a Merge feature/v1.4-ws2-orch-skeleton into feature/v1.4 (WS2 done)
